title: Technically Optimized
description: This Modpack contains a lot of Quality of Life mods and texturepacks while still improving performance and visuals. It is especially suited for technical players.
body:
**Technically Optimized**

- This modpack is built for players who value smooth performance and strong technical capabilities. It includes a range of performance and QoL mods that keep gameplay smooth and stable, even in areas with complex redstone builds.

- Essential technical tools like Tweakeroo, Carpet, Litematica, and MiniHUD are included, giving players reliable features for planning and executing builds, checking mechanics, and working efficiently on technical projects. While the pack also supports shaders and includes a few helpful texture packs, its main focus is creating a clean and stable environment for technical play.

**List of mods used**

- https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current
- https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom
- https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations
- https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds
- https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric
- https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config
- https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling
- https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
- https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet
- https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin
- https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape
- https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast
- https://modrinth.com/mod/iris
- https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica
- https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium
- https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib
- https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud
- https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
- https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks

- https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap

- https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl

**List of texturepacks used**

- https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks
- https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-dark-mode



```
I do not own any of these mods, I´ve just collected them for you to download a working modpack to just click and play
```
